title: Justin Bieber's Fun Coachella Show
summary: Justin Bieber had a big concert at Coachella, a music festival in California. He sang his old songs like Baby and Never say Never while sitting with a laptop and showing videos. He asked the crowd how far back they remember his music. He also played new songs from his albums Swag and Swag II. Other singers like The Kid Laroi joined him on stage. His wife Hailey and other famous people watched the show. This was his first big show in four years because he had health problems before. Coachella is a big festival with over 100,000 people each day.

background_read: Coachella is a famous music festival held in California every year. It started in 2002 and has many singers perform for big crowds. Justin Bieber is a popular singer who became famous as a teenager. He has had health issues in the past, which affected his tours. This concert was special because he returned to perform after a long break.
Article_Structure: WHO: Justin Bieber, a famous singer, and other guests like The Kid Laroi.
WHAT: He performed a concert at Coachella, singing old and new songs while showing videos.
WHERE: At Coachella music festival in California.
WHY: To have a fun show and share his music journey with fans after health problems.

perspectives.description: Fans were happy to see Justin Bieber perform again after his health issues.
